meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't validate ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't validate ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Validate SaaS Ideas Faster
content.seo_description: Stop guessing and start shipping. Use this intermediate Antigravity project template to validate your SaaS ideas in record time with Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates validation paralysis by automating the scaffold-to-deployment pipeline. By integrating Claude Code, you transform raw concepts into functional MVPs in hours rather than weeks. This workflow forces immediate market feedback, ensuring you only build features that your clients are actually willing to pay for today.
content.intro:
The graveyard of freelance development is littered with 'perfect' apps that nobody wanted. You spend three weeks polishing a database schema, only to find the market doesn't care. The friction isn't your coding ability; it's the lack of a rigorous, rapid-validation framework that separates a hobby project from a revenue-generating asset.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just boilerplate; it's a structural methodology designed to force your ideas into the light of day. By coupling this with the intelligence of Claude Code, you shift your role from 'code monkey' to 'product architect,' shipping high-fidelity MVPs that provide the data you need to pivot or scale before the ink on your contract dries.

steps.title: Define the Value Hypothesis
steps.description: Before writing code, formalize the one problem your client is paying to solve. We use Antigravity to generate the core schema based on this singular value prop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean project schema focusing on a single core feature that addresses [Problem]. Output a directory structure and database schema for a rapid MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a README.md outlining the core value proposition and MVP feature set based on the Antigravity schema.'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Scaffold the environment using the Antigravity CLI to ensure type safety and standard project structure from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold with authentication, database connectivity, and environment variable management pre-configured.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the Antigravity scaffold and verify that all necessary dependencies are installed in package.json.'

steps.title: Implement the Core Feedback Loop
steps.description: Build the primary interface where users interact with the solution, ensuring analytics are baked in to capture usage data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a functional UI component for the core MVP feature that includes a simple feedback collection form.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the main dashboard view and integrate a basic tracking snippet for user interaction.'

steps.title: Automate Data Persistence
steps.description: Connect the frontend to your database using standard patterns that allow for rapid schema changes as the client provides feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the API endpoints and database models required for the MVP feature set defined in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement CRUD operations for the MVP entities and run a test migration.'

steps.title: Deploy for Immediate Testing
steps.description: Push the MVP to a staging environment to get real-world eyes on the product within 24 hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment configuration file for a cloud provider that allows for one-click updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the current state to a staging environment and output the public URL.'

pro_tips: Never build an admin panel until the user side has at least 10 active users; use manual DB access instead.
Use Claude Code to write integration tests for your primary user flow only; ignore edge cases during validation.
Keep your Antigravity schema in a dedicated /docs folder so Claude can reference it for future feature expansions.
Always deploy to a 'staging' domain first; clients are more comfortable giving honest feedback on a sandbox URL.
If a feature takes more than 4 hours to scaffold using Antigravity, you are over-engineering the MVP.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, monitor the user drop-off points in your analytics and use Claude Code to iterate on the specific friction points rather than building new features.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping products that solve real problems. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
